Premium Gym Flooring Solutions

FLOOR MAT

Transform your gym and sports facility with Shah Sports' premium rubber floor mats — engineered for safety, durability, and peak performance.

Superior Cushioning
Slip Resistant
Easy to Install

Trusted by

500+ Facilities

OUR FLOORING COLLECTION

Choose from our range of premium flooring solutions designed for every fitness environment.

WEIGHT ROOMS & CARDIO AREAS
BS-2000/3000/5000/7000 series

Rubber Roll

Enhance your gym and indoor sports facilities with premium rubber roll floor mats. Designed to provide superior cushioning, slip resistance, and durability, ensuring a safe and comfortable environment for athletes of all levels. Ideal for weight rooms, cardio areas, and multipurpose sports courts.

Superior Cushioning
Slip Resistant
Easy to Install
High Traffic Ready
MODULAR INSTALLATIONS
BS-2000/3000/5000/7000 series

BS Interlocking Tiles

Transform your gym and indoor sports spaces with durable, easy-to-install tiles. Provide excellent shock absorption and slip resistance, ensuring a safe and comfortable workout environment.

Easy Assembly
Shock Absorption
Customizable Layout
Durable
ANTI-FATIGUE AREAS
BS-2000/3000/5000/7000 series

BS Laminated Interlocking

Made with two-piece construction featuring a durable recycled rubber top with foam backing for anti-fatigue purposes. Enhances shock absorption and offers superior underfoot comfort.

Anti-Fatigue
Foam Backing
Shock Absorption
Comfort
INDOOR & OUTDOOR
BS-2000/3000/5000/7000 series

BS Rubber Tiles

Designed to attenuate shock and reduce injury risk. Made from recycled rubber and EPDM flecks, making them elastic, anti-slip, and durable for both indoor and outdoor applications.

Elastic Material
Anti-Slip
Eco-Friendly
Versatile
CARDIO EQUIPMENT
BS-2000/3000/5000/7000 series

Treadmill Mat

Available in different sizes and thickness to fit your applications for spinning, treadmill, cross trainer and more. Provides excellent floor protection and equipment balance.

Multiple Sizes
Equipment Protection
Noise Reduction
Stability

WHY QUALITY FLOORING MATTERS

The right floor mat significantly impacts safety, performance, and overall aesthetics of your facility.

Safety First

Slip-resistant surfaces prevent accidents and injuries during intense workouts.

Superior Durability

High-quality rubber withstands heavy foot traffic and equipment drops.

Optimal Comfort

Cushioned surfaces reduce strain on joints for a comfortable workout experience.

Noise Reduction

Proper flooring minimizes noise from equipment and footfall significantly.

Easy Maintenance

Simple cleaning keeps your space spotless and germ-free with minimal effort.

Professional Look

Clean, professional flooring enhances the overall aesthetics of your facility.

WHY QUALITY FLOORING MATTERS

The right floor mat significantly impacts safety, performance, and overall aesthetics of your facility.

Slip-resistant surfaces help prevent accidents and injuries

High-quality materials withstand heavy foot traffic and equipment use

Cushioned surfaces reduce strain on joints for comfortable workouts

Proper flooring minimizes noise from equipment and footfall

Clean, professional flooring enhances the look of your facility

Easy to clean and maintain for optimal hygiene

OUR PORTFOLIO

See how our premium flooring solutions have transformed gyms and sports facilities across Bangladesh.

HASSLE-FREE INSTALLATION

Installing Shah Sports' rubber floor mats is a hassle-free process. The mats come in convenient rolls that can be easily cut to fit any space. This flexibility allows for quick installation, minimizing downtime and disruption to your facility's operations.

Quick Installation

Hassle-free process with convenient rolls that can be easily cut to fit any space.

Custom Fit Cutting

Flexible installation allows for quick setup, minimizing downtime and disruption.

Easy Cleaning

Regular sweeping and occasional mopping with mild detergent keeps mats clean.

Long Lasting

Robust construction ensures they retain shape and functionality over time.

Maintenance is equally straightforward. Regular sweeping and occasional mopping with mild detergent will keep the mats clean and looking new. Their robust construction ensures they retain their shape and functionality over time, even with heavy use.
